# Exercise the core flow: scan a dir, export for bash, toggle alerts, verify show.

mkdir $WORK/kube
cp $WORK/prod.yaml $WORK/kube/prod.yaml

# list includes the file, context count, current context.
exec kcm list --dir $WORK/kube
stdout 'prod.yaml'
stdout 'prod-eu'

# use emits a bash export line with the absolute path.
exec kcm use prod --dir $WORK/kube --shell=bash
stdout 'export KUBECONFIG='
stdout 'prod.yaml'

# Enable file-level alerts, then show them.
exec kcm alert enable prod --dir $WORK/kube
stdout 'alerts enabled'

exec kcm alert show prod --dir $WORK/kube
stdout 'Enabled:               true'
stdout 'delete'

# Per-context override: disable for prod-eu.
exec kcm alert disable prod --context prod-eu --dir $WORK/kube
stdout 'alerts disabled for context prod-eu'

exec kcm alert show prod --dir $WORK/kube
stdout 'File-level'
stdout 'Per-context overrides'

-- prod.yaml --
apiVersion: v1
kind: Config
current-context: prod-eu
clusters:
  - name: prod-eu-cluster
    cluster:
      server: https://prod-eu.example.test
contexts:
  - name: prod-eu
    context:
      cluster: prod-eu-cluster
      user: prod-admin
users:
  - name: prod-admin
    user:
      token: test
